title: All Bundled Up
description: A resourcepack using the new bundle fullness level too its fullest potential! By making it visible throug diffrent texture.
body:
# All Bundled Up
All Bundled Up adds diffrent filled up versions of the bundle, depending on the fullness level.
This works all in Vanilla because since 24w45a resourcepacks can check for bundle_fullness.

# Current Colors
<details>
<summary>Current Colors</summary>
- All of them colors
</details>

# Game Version
Now that 1.21.4 is out any Version after that should be working.
**But at least 24w45a is needed for this pack!**
